gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

offline.stoppedDesc: {{appName}} needs to connect to the OpenClaw Gateway before chat, role routing, and workflow execution can begin. You can start it now on port {{port}}.
offline.startingDesc: {{appName}} is starting and connecting to the OpenClaw Gateway. This usually takes a moment. Current port: {{port}}.
offline.errorDesc: {{appName}} ran into a problem while connecting to OpenClaw. You can restart the gateway now, or check the configuration in Settings.

welcome.title: {{appName}} Chat
welcome.subtitle: Hand off the work and I'll keep it moving
welcome.description: {{appName}} can handle complex tasks, drive multi-step execution, and coordinate multiple roles toward a finished result.
welcome.brainstormingDesc: Split and execute work across multiple roles
welcome.footerHint: Start by typing a goal, attaching materials, or choosing a target role from the toolbar.

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another role
